job.title: .Net / Angular Developer
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: Join our development team in Aix-en-Provence to design and maintain modern web applications using .NET and Angular. You work on varied projects for public and private sector clients.
mission.1: Develop web applications with .NET (Core/6/7/8) and Angular
mission.4: Participate in code reviews and Agile rituals
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in computer science or equivalent
profile.2: 2 to 5 years of experience in .NET and Angular development
profile.4: Knowledge of bases SQL (SQL Server, PostgreSQL)
profile.5: Team spirit and rigour in code quality
